title: Storage and One-Click Synthesis
description: Adds a Custom Storage Block with a high-capacity, map-based backend and a JEI-style interface. Store, search, then view recipes and craft from storage with one click
body:
English

  Storage and One-Click Synthesis adds a “one-stop” storage block that makes managing large amounts of items simple and
  fast.

  What it gives players:

  - Huge, tidy storage in one block: Put large quantities of items into a single storage block, reducing the need for
    many chests and keeping your base organized.
  - Instant search: Type a name or keyword to quickly find the item you want, even when you’ve stored lots of different
    items.
  - Clear browsing with pages: Items are shown in a clean grid with page buttons, so you can comfortably browse
    everything without clutter.
  - Quick deposit & withdrawal: Move items in and out with simple clicks (including fast “dump items in” actions),
    making sorting and retrieving materials much quicker than traditional chest setups.
  - Recipe viewing from the storage UI: Open a JEI-style recipe screen to check how an item is crafted without leaving
    the storage workflow.
  - One-click crafting from stored materials (crafting-table only): Craft an item directly using materials already in
    storage. If the craft requires sub-components, the mod can craft those first and then produce the final item—saving
    time and repeated manual steps.
  - Balanced progression: Furnace-type recipes (smelting/blasting/smoking/campfire), stonecutting, and smithing recipes
    can be viewed, but they are not executed by one-click crafting, preventing fuel-free processing.

  In short, it’s designed for players who like building and exploring more than inventory micromanagement: fewer chests,
  less sorting, faster crafting, and recipes at your fingertips.

  ———

  中文

  Storage and One-Click Synthesis 给玩家提供一个“一站式存储方块”，让大量物品管理变得更简单、更省时间。

  它能给玩家带来的方便：

  - 一个方块装下海量物资：把大量物品集中存进一个存储方块，告别满屋子的箱子阵列，基地更整洁。
  - 随时搜索想要的物品：输入关键词就能立刻定位物品，不管存了多少种类都不怕找不到。
  - 分页网格浏览更清爽：物品以整齐的网格展示并支持翻页，浏览体验比翻箱子更直观。
  - 取放更快捷：点击即可快速取出/存入，支持更高效率的“快速存入”操作，大幅减少整理背包与箱子的时间。
  - 存储界面内直接看配方：像 JEI 一样查看物品配方，不需要来回切换界面或到处找合成表。
  - 一键合成（仅工作台配方）：材料都在存储里也能直接合成目标物品；如果需要中间产物，会先合成中间产物再合成最终产物，省去
    反复手动合成的流程。
  - 更平衡：熔炉/高炉/烟熏/篝火、切石机、锻造台等配方可以查看，但不会被“一键合成”直接执行，避免出现不耗燃料等过强或破 坏
    平衡的情况。

  总结：这个模组把“找物品、存物品、看配方、做合成”串成一条顺手的流程，让玩家把时间花在建造、探索和玩法本身，而不是反复翻
  箱子和整理物品。
